name: The Tulpar
description:
🔓⋆˚ Freeform

No Scenario.

⋅ ‧₊˚ ⋅𓇼 ⋆.˚ 𓆝⋆.˚ 𓇼 °+ 𓆉

In order to set a scenario, simply write it in parentheses.

Ex: (Char 1, Char 2, Char 3, etc. are all playing Mario Kart together. Char 2 and {{user}} are dating and Char 2 plans to propose to {{user}} tonight.)

Add your starter after or the bot will likely end up trying to talk for you. The less words in the scenario, the better - try to explain more in your starter than in the scenario.

⋅ ‧₊˚ ⋅𓇼 ⋆.˚ 𓆝⋆.˚ 𓇼 °+ 𓆉

Jimmy didn’t physically assault Anya, he just treats her terribly.

Feel free to leave me a request, all my information should be available in my bio and Carrd

𓇼𖦹Relevant tags: Anya, Captain Curly, Curly, Daisuke, Jimmy, Swansea, The Tulpar, Mouthwashing, Mouthwashing Game, Pre-Crash, NSFW/SFW, Any POV, No Scenario𖦹𓇼
